scripts.pages:deploy: npm run pages:build && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.db:migrate:all: wrangler d1 execute token-service-db-dev --local --file=./migrations/001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute token-service-db-dev --local --file=./migrations/002_add_providers.sql
scripts.db:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 execute token-service-db --file=./migrations/001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute token-service-db --file=./migrations/002_add_providers.sql
scripts.dev:cf: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist --compatibility-date=2024-01-01 --d1=DB
